title: Inventory Shuffle
description: Every once in a while your inventory is shuffled!
body:
# Inventory Shuffle

**Inventory Shuffle** periodically randomizes player inventories on the server. At fixed intervals, all item slots are shuffled - including main inventory, hotbar, armor, off-hand, ender chest, and the contents of shulker boxes. The mod is designed as a straightforward gameplay modifier that increases difficulty without changing core mechanics. **Yes, you can still beat the game!**

## Features

- **Timed Shuffle Events**: Every 2-5 minutes, all online players have their inventories shuffled.
- **Global Countdown Warning**: A boss bar appears 5 seconds before each shuffle, displaying a numeric countdown and progress indicator.
- **Complete Inventory Coverage**: Shuffles all 41 player inventory slots (main inventory, hotbar, armor, off-hand).
- **Ender Chest Included**: Each player's ender chest inventory is also shuffled.
- **Shulker Box Support**: Shuffles the contents of shulker boxes, including shulker boxes in ender chest.
- **Vanilla-Compatible**: Works seamlessly with vanilla Minecraft and most other mods (which do not change the inventory mechanics).
- **Server-Side**: Only the server (or the player hosting the world) needs the mod installed for multiplayer.

## Why Play?

This mod introduces periodic disruption to inventory management without altering core gameplay systems. Resource organization becomes a strategic challenge, especially during combat, exploration, or automation-heavy setups. It is suitable for challenge runs, multiplayer servers, and content creation scenarios where controlled unpredictability is desired.
